posts.author: UnknownLead
posts.text: Raymond appoints ex BEL CMD Bhanu Prakash Srivastava as CEO of Defence vertical. Press release gives signs of moving up the value chain into electronics, software and system integrations. Getting an ex PSU CMD will also signal confidence while trying to integrate in indigenous defence programs. image 1397×202 38.5 KB
